priority.description: Priority of the rule. Lower number corresponds to higher precedence.

session_matcher.description: CEL expression for matching on session criteria.

basic_profile.description: Profile which tells what the primitive action should be. Possible values are: * ALLOW * DENY. Possible values are: `BASIC_PROFILE_UNSPECIFIED`, `ALLOW`, `DENY`.

name.description: Name of the resource. ame is the full resource name so projects/{project}/locations/{location}/gatewaySecurityPolicies/{gateway_security_policy}/rules/{rule} rule should match the pattern: (^a-z?$).

location.description: The location of the gateway security policy.

gateway_security_policy.description: The name of the gatewat security policy this rule belongs to.

application_matcher.description: CEL expression for matching on L7/application level criteria.

tls_inspection_enabled.description: Flag to enable TLS inspection of traffic matching on. Can only be true if the parent GatewaySecurityPolicy references a TLSInspectionConfig.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
